Uttarakhand State Entrance Examination.verdict_note: All 5 sampled Uttaranchal University rows (CSE General 115905/328120, Civil General 57220/327490, Mech OBC 446210/771710, EE ST 427555/509380, Petroleum ST 512455/512455) match the kollegeapply.com page exactly, though the portal labels them 'expected' 2024 cutoffs rather than official UKSEE/uktech.ac.in figures, so treat as lower-fidelity portal data.
